ddl.value: ("type" = 'DirectMessage' AND "name" IS NULL) OR ("type" = 'Room' AND "name" IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM("name")) BETWEEN 1 AND 100)
ddl.name: rooms_name_check

ddl.value: ("type" = 'DirectMessage' AND "participantKey" IS NOT NULL) OR ("type" = 'Room' AND "participantKey" IS NULL)
ddl.name: participant_key_type
